reasoning: The control CCCS AC-17 focuses on remote access, which in a Kubernetes context translates to ensuring that network access is properly restricted and secured. This involves setting up NetworkPolicies to deny ingress by default, restricting services from being exposed to the public internet via LoadBalancer without proper controls, and ensuring that any ingress traffic is secured with TLS. These measures align with the intent of preventing unauthorized remote access to Kubernetes resources.
title: CCCS AC-17: Remote Access
